ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project repository */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the project is currently active */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility level of the project (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file in the repository */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was last updated */,
  "last_commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the last commit that modified the file */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the file is a binary file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the function belongs to */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "function_signature" TEXT /* Signature of the function (including parameters and return types) */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number where the function starts in the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the function was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the function was last updated */,
  "is_test" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the function is a test function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., cyclomatic complexity, lines of code) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., complexity, performance) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., lines, points) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, architect, manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is an admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project or file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the project or file */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the project or file */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., code quality, performance) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the generated report file */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the integration belongs to */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the third-party tool */,
  "tool_url" TEXT /* URL of the third-party tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the integration was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the integration is active */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the third-party tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
